business_ideas.idea: Physical newsletter/reading digest with curated articles, marked up and printed weekly ('Scratch the Itch')
AI-powered McKenzie consulting jokes (satirizing consulting inefficiency and overpriced advice)
Dude Wipes - premium wet wipes sold as lifestyle product, $220M revenue annual
Tushy - bidet attachment for toilets to convert standard toilets to Japanese-style seats

predictions.text: Of 900k listeners, roughly 100-1000 will achieve life-changing wealth from podcast ideas shared
Physical curation and analog touchpoints will become luxury competitive advantage as digital scales
